---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What is missing today?

## Proposed solution

What you would like the driver to do.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches or workarounds you have tried.

## Additional context

Links, references to the ADBC or Spark Connect specs, or related issues.
